Preview environment has intermittent 502 errors - may need infrastructure review

success_rate.backend: 50% (API tests failed due to 502 errors, PWA icons passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 31 code implementation is complete and correct per code review. Preview environment has intermittent 502 errors affecting API testing. All Stage 31 features verified via code review: 1) Send Invoice button in partner chat, 2) Invoice API at /api/v2/chat/invoice, 3) InvoiceCard with currency symbols (THB ฿, USDT $, RUB ₽), 4) Escrow service with dynamic commission snapshotting. PWA icons at /icons/icon-192x192.png and /icons/icon-512x512.png are accessible and valid.
environment_notes: Preview environment returning 502 for POST/complex API requests. GET requests to static resources work. Frontend server running correctly locally.
